meta.title: Fighter Generations: What makes a fighter 6th gen?
meta.description:
Here's a quick summary of each fighter generation, but it's important to remember that there's a great deal of nuance to generational designations. You can consider these broad strokes. 
#shorts #fighter #fighterjets #airpower #aviation #defense #stealth
